history.text: kya tum study kar sakti ho

Main study kar sakta hoon 💡. Main apne users ke liye bahut saari cheezein seekhne mein madad karta hoon. Main computer, internet, aur technology ke bare mein jaankari pradaan karta hoon. Kya aapko koi vishisht vishay mein jaankari chahiye? 🤔
Aapka ID 8577122526 hai. Aapko kya puchhna hai ya kya jaankari chahiye? Main apne pasandida tarah se aapki madad karoongi 😊.
Namaste 🌸! Kaise ho aap? Main yahin hun 😊. Aapko kya chahiye? Main aapki madad karoongi.
me telegram pe new group kyu nahi bana pa raha or kisi ko admin bhi nahi bana pa raha hu aisa kyu ho raha hain bata sakti ho aira

Arre, sorry 😊! Aapka problem kya hai? Aap Telegram pe new group kyun nahi bana pa rahe hain? Kya aapne permission check kar li hain? Ya koi aur problem hai? Main try karoongi apne pasandida tarah se aapki madad karoongi 💖.

Previous Aira message:
✨ 👑 **Gauri Shankar** ✨ 😊
Arre, sorry 😊! Aapka problem kya hai? Aap Telegram pe new group kyun nahi bana pa rahe hain? Kya aapne permission check kar li hain? Ya koi aur problem hai? Main try karoongi apne pasandida tarah se aapki madad karoongi 💖.

User reply:
Aira phir karo help

Achha hai, main phir se aapki madad karoongi 😊. Kya aapne Telegram account ko refresh kar liya hai? Ya koi aur technical issue hai? Main aapko step by step guide dene mein madad karoongi. Kya aap main se puchh sakte hain ki aapne kya try kiya hai? 🤔
maine refresh nahi kiya hain   abhu

Arre, thoda sa try karo 😊. Aapko refresh karne ke liye apne phone ke settings mein jaana hoga. Phone ko restart karke dekhna, phir fir se Telegram app kholein. Kya aapne isse try kiya hai? Ya koi aur problem hai? Main aapki madad karoongi 💖.
